# GitHub Template Configuration

This repository is configured as a GitHub Template.

## What gets included when someone uses this template:
- `.github/skills/planner/` — the CopilotForge planner skill
- `.copilot/agents/` — example agent definitions
- `docs/` — documentation
- `cookbook/` — code recipes
- `templates/` — file templates
- `README.md`, `LICENSE`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, etc.

## What users should do after creating from template:
1. Edit README.md to describe their own project
2. Open Copilot Chat and say "set up my project"
3. Answer the 5 wizard questions
4. The wizard generates everything automatically for their project

## GitHub Template Features Enabled:
- Template can be used to create new repositories
- Template instructions are shown after repository creation
- See `.github/TEMPLATE_INSTRUCTIONS.md` for the welcome message
